ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds when the metrics were collected */,
  "window_size" REAL /* Window size for the performance measurement */,
  "packet_count" INTEGER /* Total number of packets processed */,
  "min_latency" INTEGER /* Minimum latency recorded */,
  "mean_latency" REAL /* Mean latency calculated */,
  "median_latency" REAL /* Median latency value */,
  "95th_percentile" INTEGER /* 95th percentile latency value */,
  "99th_percentile" INTEGER /* 99th percentile latency value */,
  "99_9th_percentile" INTEGER /* 99.9th percentile latency value */,
  "max_latency" INTEGER /* Maximum latency recorded */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Total number of errors encountered */,
  "network_node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_nodes table */,
  "collection_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_network_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the network node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node */,
  "hardware_info" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the node (e.g., CPU, RAM) */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version installed on the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated performance metric */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., latency, packet loss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, create report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the action (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Node ID of the network node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current health status of the node (e.g., healthy, degraded, down) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last health status update */,
  "health_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the node's health */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_health_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Node ID of the network node */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency for the node */,
  "total_packets" INTEGER /* Total packets processed */,
  "total_errors" INTEGER /* Total errors encountered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was generated */,
  "summary_interval" TEXT /* Interval for the summary (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_summary_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the associated user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the associated role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assigned the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
